Prime 4,200 m² beachfront land plot on Las Terrenas's most sought-after stretch. Fully titled, flat terrain with municipal utilities available at the boundary. Ideal for a boutique hotel, luxury villa development, or private compound. Seller financing available.

Features: Beachfront, Titled Land, Development Opportunity, Flat Terrain
